arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate shares concerning injury update despite Liverpool return
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate has admitted he is not yet 100% fit after returning from a knee injury for Liverpool earlier this month

arts.ttl: Club want rid of Nottingham Forest target ‘immediately’ – Will sanction loan, asking price considered high
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are eyeing up a move for Sporting Club de Portugal midfielder Marcus Edwards, with the Portuguese side open to a loan deal. That’s according to Record, who report that Sporting are keen to move Edwards on this month if they can. arts.ttl: 'Naïve not to' - Mikel Arteta makes transfer vow as Arsenal dealt huge blow in Liverpool battle
arts.sum: Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus has suffered a suspected ACL injury to deplete Gunners numbers further as they look to keep pace with Liverpool at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £25m record breaker now open to Premier League move after Liverpool make approach to sign him
Arne Slot receives Liverpool transfer boost as target confirms future plans
arts.sum: Liverpool appear to be preparing their first transfer for Arne Slot in the summer, as the Reds look to move ahead of rivals Chelsea and Aston Villa in the race for Stefanos Tzimas

arts.ttl: Monchi negotiating Aston Villa arrival – Working to beat Liverpool and Newcastle, keen to sell Diego Carlos first
arts.sum: Aston Villa, Liverpool and Newcastle United are all reportedly keen on Sevilla’s Loïc Badé in the winter market. Last weekend, AS reported Liverpool and Newcastle are ‘betting heavily’ on the defender. The Villans have started discussions with the La Liga side over a deal for him this month. arts.sum: Darwin Nunez has struggled in front of goal for Liverpool this season, but there have been no indications from Arne Slot that the Reds want to cut their losses on the Uruguay star
